description: Mesh retries amplify load and worsen an outage.
body: Failure mode: routes are configured with generous retries and no budget, so when a dependency degrades every caller retries, multiplying load and turning a brownout into a full outage. Detection signals: upstream request volume spikes during failures, retryOn covers non-idempotent or always-failing cases, and per-try plus overall timeouts allow many attempts. Do not raise retry counts to push through errors. Safer fallback: bound attempts, set retryOn to idempotent retryable failures only, ensure per-try timeout fits within the overall timeout, add a retry budget/circuit breaker, and fail fast when the dependency is down.
